name: CoreLogic, Inc.
description: CoreLogic, Inc. is a leading global property information, analytics, and data-enabled solutions provider. The company's database contains comprehensive financial, property, and consumer information, covering billions of records spanning multiple decades. CoreLogic serves the real estate, mortgage finance, insurance, public sector, and capital markets, delivering unique insights and analytics to help clients identify and manage growth opportunities, improve performance, and mitigate risk.
